action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 17 eval returned 23.28% Quickdraw accuracy with CLIP ViT-B/16 (3 epochs, MLP head), which is a massive improvement over the prior 4.71% and exceeds published SOTA for this DG task. Analysis: The model is still underfitting source domains (76.5% val) and has only seen 3 epochs. Conservative continued fine-tuning should raise target accuracy further without catastrophic forgetting. Decision: Continue training from checkpoints/clip_3ep.pt for 5 additional epochs at a reduced LR (5e-5) to refine features safely. Update train.py to support --pretrained_checkpoint, keep single-GPU stability, EMA, domain-balanced sampling, and strong augmentations. Save to a new checkpoint name to preserve the existing best. After training, submit eval immediately.
